title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 293.240 - Blasting cartridge requirements
text:
293.240.  Blasting cartridge requirements. — It shall be unlawful for coal miners in any mine to charge a blasting hole with loose powder, or otherwise than with a properly constructed cartridge; and in dry and dusty mines, it shall be unlawful to load cartridges in the mines except with a powder can constructed for the purpose.
(L. 1959 S.B. 188 § 26)
